pages.raw_text:
Today the contest for member.
ship on the commission that Is to
write the new city charter reduced
itself to a stralght-out test between
the Munter ticket and the citizens
or business mems ticket. The fight
is waxing hot at the finish, with
both sides using their best energies
to control the commission.


Originally the business men had
seven Of the Munter ticket on their
slate, but the members Of the Mum
ter ticket would not consent TO this
arrangement. announcing their In.
tention to stand or fall by their
original agreement--each for all
and all for each, so to speak.


Hence, the seven names thns add.
ed to the business mcn's ticket
